TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Mnarux Ceher = Tg1, Maanu kesun mnarux Ceher Mnarux mneru pnatis ntgteru ka mnarux Ceher, knthuwe meeru mnarux ka nii, pneeyah Ceherkangcyung neru, knciyuk naq hei ini knarux ka 95% seediq, moda dara ma qsiya Lingpa gmaran mangal mnarux teerang ma Ceher teerang icil ka 5% seediq. Maha mnarux hei truma ani inu ma kana hei bnkeyan, so ka Lingpace, Nawmo, Syungmo, rmune, buuc, qraqin, Siawhwataw, Minyaw Sngctaw dnii, Lingpaceher ma Buucceher qtaan klaali, niqal dungal de Cehersyng Nawmoyen; stikuh hari spegan maangal mnarux Ceher teerang iicil daka mnarux teerang. Tg2. Ndaan meeru Spooda meeru turuq snkiya daka pshengac na; seediq msgaalu psdaling ma seediq kntnaun meniq tnsapah kii asi angal mnarux. Uxe kesun maha niqal kana beyax na meeru ka seediq mnarux Ceher, netur meeniq stliyus Ceher turuq de kii maha niqal beyax meeru. Seengun mekan iyu hmrinas daha gdregan de, kii maha hridun knbeyax na meeru. Duma de qlahang naq hari hei, tbsengu, mangal klabuy sresun ma ubun quwaq daka muhing ka msseyaq, mangal klabuy sresun lbuun ka niqal turuq, pdaun pqluli Matong ma qdanun kulu niqal gemuk ssliyan sudu, kii maha pncngan knparu hridan meeru. Tg3, ali mgleing hei Maha sepac betaq maxal daha gdregan hari ruun meyah mnarux, bobo ruun mmteru betaq maxal daha idas de mnnarux ciida mkrana betaq mnnarux teerang kii siicu ba. Tg4, maha knpiya ali meeru Meeniq muudus Ceherkangcyung ka turuq kii maha mreeru, spegun stliyus Ceher kii klaun knbeyax mreeru na, knmalu bnnege iyu knciyuk Ceher, maha ini dehuk daha gdregan meelih pmeru denu. Tg5, qtaun mnnarux hei Pusu de uka ani maanu mnarux, netur meyah mnarux de hmrinas daha gdregan msseyaq, clokah cnhdilan, mttilux hei, muuwic kana hei, uka lnglungan mekan ido, knbeyax bale de mnnarux teerang ma msseyaq dara. Tg6, ooda kndakar Ooda T1; Snbaan mnarux Ceher qulun naq pbetaq qumi kacemyaw ka laqi rabu. Ooda T2; Ktnaun spegan ppuqun tkbeyax hei, spdngusun kndesan, sbleyaq pgkere hei ka seung pstarin. Ooda T3; ssengun ali spqita hei, tena pkela mnarux, tena pqita isin, pndungus mekan iyu de pkmalu mnarux. Pnyahan pnatas šł≠śĖáśĖáÁę†šĺÜŤá™Bakan Temu Tseeru na mptgesa Bakan Temu ka pnatis nii.
S.PHON: = mna…ĺux ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ = tg*, maanu k…ôsun mna…ĺux ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ mna…ĺux mn…ô…ĺu pnatis ntgt…ô…ĺu ka mna…ĺux ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ, kntńßuw…ô m…ô…ô…ĺu mna…ĺux ka nii, pn…ô…ôańß ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺkaŇč ¶juŇč n…ô…ĺu, kn ¶ijuk naq ńß…ôi ini kna…ĺux ka **% s…ô…ôdiq, moda da…ĺa ma qsija liŇčpa gma…ĺan maŇčal mna…ĺux t…ô…ô…ĺaŇč ma ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ t…ô…ô…ĺaŇč i ¶il ka *% s…ô…ôdiq. mańßa mna…ĺux ńß…ôi t…ĺuma ani inu ma kana ńß…ôi bnk…ôan, so ka liŇčpa ¶…ô, nawmo, sjuŇčmo, …ĺmun…ô, buu ¶, q…ĺaqin, siawńßwataw, minjaw sŇč ¶taw dnii, liŇčpa ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ ma buu ¶ ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ qtaan klaali, niqal duŇčal d…ô ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺsjŇč nawmoj…ôn; stikuńß ńßa…ĺi sp…ôgan maaŇčal mna…ĺux ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ t…ô…ô…ĺaŇč ii ¶il daka mna…ĺux t…ô…ô…ĺaŇč. tg*. ndaan m…ô…ô…ĺu spooda m…ô…ô…ĺu tu…ĺuq snkija daka psńß…ôŇča ¶ na; s…ô…ôdiq msgaalu psdaliŇč ma s…ô…ôdiq kntnaun m…ôniq tnsapańß kii asi aŇčal mna…ĺux. ux…ô k…ôsun mańßa niqal kana b…ôax na m…ô…ô…ĺu ka s…ô…ôdiq mna…ĺux ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ, n…ôtu…ĺ m…ô…ôniq stlijus ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ tu…ĺuq d…ô kii mańßa niqal b…ôax m…ô…ô…ĺu. s…ô…ôŇčun m…ôkan iju ńßm…ĺinas dańßa gd…ĺ…ôgan d…ô, kii mańßa ńß…ĺidun knb…ôax na m…ô…ô…ĺu. duma d…ô qlańßaŇč naq ńßa…ĺi ńß…ôi, tbs…ôŇču, maŇčal klabuj s…ĺ…ôsun ma ubun quwaq daka muńßiŇč ka mss…ôaq, maŇčal klabuj s…ĺ…ôsun lbuun ka niqal tu…ĺuq, pdaun pqluli matoŇč ma qdanun kulu niqal g…ômuk sslijan sudu, kii mańßa pn ¶Ňčan knpa…ĺu ńß…ĺidan m…ô…ô…ĺu. tg*, ali mgl…ôiŇč ńß…ôi mańßa s…ôpa ¶ b…ôtaq maxal dańßa gd…ĺ…ôgan ńßa…ĺi …ĺuun m…ôańß mna…ĺux, bobo …ĺuun mmt…ô…ĺu b…ôtaq maxal dańßa idas d…ô mnna…ĺux ¶iida mk…ĺana b…ôtaq mnna…ĺux t…ô…ô…ĺaŇč kii sii ¶u ba. tg*, mańßa knpija ali m…ô…ô…ĺu m…ô…ôniq muudus ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺkaŇč ¶juŇč ka tu…ĺuq kii mańßa m…ĺ…ô…ô…ĺu, sp…ôgun stlijus ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ kii klaun knb…ôax m…ĺ…ô…ô…ĺu na, knmalu bnn…ôg…ô iju kn ¶ijuk ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ, mańßa ini d…ôńßuk dańßa gd…ĺ…ôgan m…ô…ôlińß pm…ô…ĺu d…ônu. tg*, qtaun mnna…ĺux ńß…ôi pusu d…ô uka ani maanu mna…ĺux, n…ôtu…ĺ m…ôańß mna…ĺux d…ô ńßm…ĺinas dańßa gd…ĺ…ôgan mss…ôaq, ¶lokańß ¶nńßdilan, mttilux ńß…ôi, muuwi ¶ kana ńß…ôi, uka lŇčluŇčan m…ôkan ido, knb…ôax bal…ô d…ô mnna…ĺux t…ô…ô…ĺaŇč ma mss…ôaq da…ĺa. tg*, ooda kndaka…ĺ ooda t*; snbaan mna…ĺux ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ qulun naq pb…ôtaq qumi ka ¶…ômjaw ka laqi …ĺabu. ooda t*; ktnaun sp…ôgan ppuqun tkb…ôax ńß…ôi, spdŇčusun knd…ôsan, sbl…ôaq pgk…ô…ĺ…ô ńß…ôi ka s…ôuŇč psta…ĺin. ooda t*; ss…ôŇčun ali spqita ńß…ôi, t…ôna pk…ôla mna…ĺux, t…ôna pqita isin, pnduŇčus m…ôkan iju d…ô pkmalu mna…ĺux. pnjańßan pnatas ******bakan t…ômu ts…ô…ô…ĺu na mptg…ôsa bakan t…ômu ka pnatis nii.
S.FORM: = Mnarux Ceher = Tg1, Maanu kesun mnarux Ceher Mnarux mneru pnatis ntgteru ka mnarux Ceher, knthuwe meeru mnarux ka nii, pneeyah Ceherkangcyung neru, knciyuk naq hei ini knarux ka 95% seediq, moda dara ma qsiya Lingpa gmaran mangal mnarux teerang ma Ceher teerang icil ka 5% seediq. Maha mnarux hei truma ani inu ma kana hei bnkeyan, so ka Lingpace, Nawmo, Syungmo, rmune, buuc, qraqin, Siawhwataw, Minyaw Sngctaw dnii, Lingpaceher ma Buucceher qtaan klaali, niqal dungal de Cehersyng Nawmoyen; stikuh hari spegan maangal mnarux Ceher teerang iicil daka mnarux teerang. Tg2. Ndaan meeru Spooda meeru turuq snkiya daka pshengac na; seediq msgaalu psdaling ma seediq kntnaun meniq tnsapah kii asi angal mnarux. Uxe kesun maha niqal kana beyax na meeru ka seediq mnarux Ceher, netur meeniq stliyus Ceher turuq de kii maha niqal beyax meeru. Seengun mekan iyu hmrinas daha gdregan de, kii maha hridun knbeyax na meeru. Duma de qlahang naq hari hei, tbsengu, mangal klabuy sresun ma ubun quwaq daka muhing ka msseyaq, mangal klabuy sresun lbuun ka niqal turuq, pdaun pqluli Matong ma qdanun kulu niqal gemuk ssliyan sudu, kii maha pncngan knparu hridan meeru. Tg3, ali mgleing hei Maha sepac betaq maxal daha gdregan hari ruun meyah mnarux, bobo ruun mmteru betaq maxal daha idas de mnnarux ciida mkrana betaq mnnarux teerang kii siicu ba. Tg4, maha knpiya ali meeru Meeniq muudus Ceherkangcyung ka turuq kii maha mreeru, spegun stliyus Ceher kii klaun knbeyax mreeru na, knmalu bnnege iyu knciyuk Ceher, maha ini dehuk daha gdregan meelih pmeru denu. Tg5, qtaun mnnarux hei Pusu de uka ani maanu mnarux, netur meyah mnarux de hmrinas daha gdregan msseyaq, clokah cnhdilan, mttilux hei, muuwic kana hei, uka lnglungan mekan ido, knbeyax bale de mnnarux teerang ma msseyaq dara. Tg6, ooda kndakar Ooda T1; Snbaan mnarux Ceher qulun naq pbetaq qumi kacemyaw ka laqi rabu. Ooda T2; Ktnaun spegan ppuqun tkbeyax hei, spdngusun kndesan, sbleyaq pgkere hei ka seung pstarin. Ooda T3; ssengun ali spqita hei, tena pkela mnarux, tena pqita isin, pndungus mekan iyu de pkmalu mnarux. Pnyahan pnatas šł≠śĖáśĖáÁę†šĺÜŤá™Bakan Temu Tseeru na mptgesa Bakan Temu ka pnatis nii.

stikuńß ńßa…ĺi sp…ôgan maaŇčal mna…ĺux ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ t…ô…ô…ĺaŇč ii ¶il daka mna…ĺux t…ô…ô…ĺaŇč. tg*. ndaan m…ô…ô…ĺu spooda m…ô…ô…ĺu tu…ĺuq snkija daka psńß…ôŇča ¶ na; s…ô…ôdiq msgaalu psdaliŇč ma s…ô…ôdiq kntnaun m…ôniq tnsapańß kii asi aŇčal mna…ĺux. ux…ô k…ôsun mańßa niqal kana b…ôax na m…ô…ô…ĺu ka s…ô…ôdiq mna…ĺux ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ, n…ôtu…ĺ m…ô…ôniq stlijus ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ tu…ĺuq d…ô kii mańßa niqal b…ôax m…ô…ô…ĺu. s…ô…ôŇčun m…ôkan iju ńßm…ĺinas dańßa gd…ĺ…ôgan d…ô, kii mańßa ńß…ĺidun knb…ôax na m…ô…ô…ĺu. duma d…ô qlańßaŇč naq ńßa…ĺi ńß…ôi, tbs…ôŇču, maŇčal klabuj s…ĺ…ôsun ma ubun quwaq daka muńßiŇč ka mss…ôaq, maŇčal klabuj s…ĺ…ôsun lbuun ka niqal tu…ĺuq, pdaun pqluli matoŇč ma qdanun kulu niqal g…ômuk sslijan sudu, kii mańßa pn ¶Ňčan knpa…ĺu ńß…ĺidan m…ô…ô…ĺu. tg*, ali mgl…ôiŇč ńß…ôi mańßa s…ôpa ¶ b…ôtaq maxal dańßa gd…ĺ…ôgan ńßa…ĺi …ĺuun m…ôańß mna…ĺux, bobo …ĺuun mmt…ô…ĺu b…ôtaq maxal dańßa idas d…ô mnna…ĺux ¶iida mk…ĺana b…ôtaq mnna…ĺux t…ô…ô…ĺaŇč kii sii ¶u ba. tg*, mańßa knpija ali m…ô…ô…ĺu m…ô…ôniq muudus ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺkaŇč ¶juŇč ka tu…ĺuq kii mańßa m…ĺ…ô…ô…ĺu, sp…ôgun stlijus ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ kii klaun knb…ôax m…ĺ…ô…ô…ĺu na, knmalu bnn…ôg…ô iju kn ¶ijuk ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ, mańßa ini d…ôńßuk dańßa gd…ĺ…ôgan m…ô…ôlińß pm…ô…ĺu d…ônu. tg*, qtaun mnna…ĺux ńß…ôi pusu d…ô uka ani maanu mna…ĺux, n…ôtu…ĺ m…ôańß mna…ĺux d…ô ńßm…ĺinas dańßa gd…ĺ…ôgan mss…ôaq, ¶lokańß ¶nńßdilan, mttilux ńß…ôi, muuwi ¶ kana ńß…ôi, uka lŇčluŇčan m…ôkan ido, knb…ôax bal…ô d…ô mnna…ĺux t…ô…ô…ĺaŇč ma mss…ôaq da…ĺa. tg*, ooda kndaka…ĺ ooda t*; snbaan mna…ĺux ¶…ôńß…ô…ĺ qulun naq pb…ôtaq qumi ka ¶…ômjaw ka laqi …ĺabu. ooda t*; ktnaun sp…ôgan ppuqun tkb…ôax ńß…ôi, spdŇčusun knd…ôsan, sbl…ôaq pgk…ô…ĺ…ô ńß…ôi ka s…ôuŇč psta…ĺin. ooda t*; ss…ôŇčun ali spqita ńß…ôi, t…ôna pk…ôla mna…ĺux, t…ôna pqita isin, pnduŇčus m…ôkan iju d…ô pkmalu mna…ĺux. pnjańßan pnatas ******bakan t…ômu ts…ô…ô…ĺu na mptg…ôsa bakan t…ômu ka pnatis nii.
